loop1.title: Transfer readiness
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for transfer readiness — headroom is omitted because the asset's rated_kva nameplate is empty.

loop1.title: Activity
loop1.note: Showing total active power — transfer counts and days-since are not measured by this UPS meter.

loop1.title: Source Transfer — Composite
loop1.note: Showing input power metrics (voltage, current) and transfer activity — bypass voltage, bypass frequency, and readiness scores are not measured by this UPS asset.
